mapper.select:
/* ptnrInsrMapper.getInsrHistory */
SELECT A.RATE_CD , FN_GET_RATENM(A.RATE_CD) AS RATE_NM , A.INSR_CD , FN_GET_CODENM('CMN0246', A.INSR_CD) AS INSR_NM , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.STRT_DTTM, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') + 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AS EFCT_STRT_DT , SUBSTR(A.END_DTTM, 1, 8) AS EFCT_END_DT , (SELECT SUB_LINK_NAME FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SVC_CNTR_NO = A.SVC_CNTR_NO AND SUB_LINK_NAME IS NOT NULL AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CUST_NM FROM MSP_INSR_MEMBER_MST A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.INSR_CD = #{insrCd} ORDER BY A.END_DTTM DESC
